basic_details.job_title: NDTL Senior Technical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: National Dope Testing Laboratory, Government of India (NDTL)
basic_details.short_information: National Dope Testing Laboratory (NDTL) Senior Technical Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 04 April 2026 on the official website. Has been announced through the NDTL Senior Technical Officer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Officers of the Central/State Government/PSUs/Autonomous Bodies holding analogous post on regular basis or having 3 years regular service in Pay Matrix Level 7 (Rs. 44,900-1,42,400), and possessing: Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering in Computer Science / Electronics & Communication / Information Technology (IT) or MCA or M.Sc. (IT) from a UGC/AICTE recognized University / Institute; Four years post qualification experience in a reputed organization handling electronic data processing. The electronic data processing experience must include: Data Administration and Operational work – Maintaining database by collecting information from different sources; Website content management; Internet surfing; Handling bulk e-communications. Desirable: Development and Administration of e-Systems, testing, installing and application of new software and ensuring functioning, up-gradation / modification and replacement etc.

selection_process: Shortlisting of applications received through proper channel Interview / interaction by the selection committee
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NDTL Senior Technical Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NDTL Senior Technical Officer (Information Technology) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the NDTL Senior Technical Officer (Information Technology) recruitment is 19th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering in Computer Science, Electronics & Communication, or Information Technology (IT), or an MCA or M.Sc. (IT) from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Senior Technical Officer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Technical Officer post is 56 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary in the Pay Matrix ranging from Rs. 56,100 to Rs. 1,77,500 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is Deputation.

faq.question: Q8. What kind of experience is required for the Senior Technical Officer post?
faq.answer: A minimum of four years of post-qualification experience in handling electronic data processing, including data administration, website content management, and bulk e-communications, is required.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the National Dope Testing Laboratory located?
faq.answer: The National Dope Testing Laboratory is located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110003.
